win_condition: Solve 3 Mysteries (or 3 Mysteries + Final Mystery if the Ancient One awakens)
message: Eldritch Horror is fully cooperative. Solve 3 of the Ancient One's Mysteries to win. If the Ancient One awakens, you must also solve the Final Mystery. You lose if: Doom reaches 0 and the Ancient One awakens with no path to victory, all investigators are eliminated, the Mythos deck runs out, or a card effect causes you to lose.
